question: What is the return policy?
answer: You can return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund, provided the item is unused and in original packaging. Electronics and accessories must be returned with all original components including cables, manuals, and packaging inserts. Items marked as discontinued or final-sale are not eligible for return. To initiate a return, create a support ticket with your order ID and reason for return. You will receive a prepaid return label by email within 1 business day.

question: How long does it take to process a refund?
answer: Once your returned item is received and inspected, refunds are processed within 3–5 business days. The refund is credited to the original payment method. Credit card refunds may take an additional 3–7 days to appear on your statement depending on your bank. If you have not received your refund after 10 business days, contact support with your return tracking number.

question: What are the shipping options and costs?
answer: We offer standard shipping (3–5 business days) and express shipping (1–2 business days). Standard shipping is free on all orders over $35. Orders below $35 have a flat $4.99 standard shipping fee. Express shipping is available for $12.99 regardless of order size. Orders placed before 2 PM local time on business days are shipped the same day. Orders placed after 2 PM or on weekends ship the next business day.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: We currently ship to the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, Australia, and select European Union countries. International shipping rates vary by destination and are calculated at checkout. International orders may be subject to customs duties and import taxes, which are the responsibility of the customer. Delivery times for international orders range from 7–21 business days depending on the destination and customs processing.

question: What happens if my package is lost or damaged in transit?
answer: If your package is lost or arrives damaged, contact our support team within 7 days of the expected delivery date. Provide your order ID and a description or photos of the damage. For lost packages, we will initiate a carrier investigation within 2 business days. If the package cannot be located within 5 business days, we will reship the item at no additional cost or issue a full refund, at your preference.

question: How do I claim a warranty?
answer: To claim a warranty, create a support ticket and include your order ID, a description of the defect, and photos if applicable. We will review your claim within 2 business days. If the claim is approved, we will send a replacement unit or issue a store credit depending on product availability. Warranty claims for out-of-stock products will receive a store credit equal to the original purchase price. Physical damage, liquid damage, and unauthorized modifications void the warranty.

question: Does the warranty cover accessories like cables and ear cushions?
answer: Wear-and-tear accessories such as ear cushions, keycaps, and cable sheaths are not covered by the standard warranty. These are considered consumable parts. Replacement parts for supported products can be purchased separately through our accessories catalog. For any defect that appears within 30 days of purchase on a wear item, contact support as this may qualify for a goodwill replacement.

question: How do I track my order?
answer: You can track your order at any time by asking for your order status with your order ID (format: ORD-001). Our system will provide the current shipping status, carrier name, and estimated delivery date. You will also receive a tracking email when your order ships. If tracking information is not updating after 2 business days, contact support.

question: Can I cancel my order?
answer: Orders can be cancelled before they are dispatched. To cancel, use the cancel order option and provide your order ID. If the order has already shipped, you will need to wait for delivery and then initiate a return. Orders that are processing can be cancelled instantly. Orders with a shipped status can no longer be cancelled but can be returned once received.

question: Can I change my shipping address after placing the order?
answer: Address changes are possible only if the order has not yet been dispatched. Contact support immediately with your order ID and the new shipping address. If the order has already shipped, we are unable to redirect it. In that case, you may need to refuse the delivery and request a reship, which may incur an additional shipping fee.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and Apple Pay. All transactions are processed securely using 256-bit TLS encryption. We do not store card numbers on our servers. Payment is charged at the time of order placement.

question: Is it safe to use my credit card on your website?
answer: Yes. All payment pages use HTTPS with TLS 1.3 encryption. We are PCI-DSS compliant and do not store full card numbers. Payment processing is handled by a certified third-party payment gateway. If you notice any unauthorized charges, contact your bank immediately and then notify our support team.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your registered email address and you will receive a password reset link within 5 minutes. The link expires after 30 minutes. If you do not receive the email, check your spam folder or contact support with your registered email address.

question: What does out-of-stock mean and when will items be restocked?
answer: Out-of-stock means the item is temporarily unavailable for purchase. Expected restock times vary by product. You can check the product page for restock estimates or contact support for an update. Pre-orders are available for some products; these ship automatically once stock arrives. Restock notifications by email are available for most out-of-stock items.
